description:
Backlog anchor: `packages/pi-om-extension/docs/mastra-parity-backlog.md` → **Tier 1 / section 1. Temporal reasoning overhaul**.

Goal: add multi-day regression coverage so stale relative references, elapsed gaps, resumed work, and future state changes remain chronologically correct over time.

Relevant test surfaces:
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/__tests__/integration/observation-cycle-*.test.ts`
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/__tests__/unit/engine-build-context.test.ts`
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/__tests__/unit/format.test.ts`
- any new temporal helper tests added under `packages/pi-om-extension/src/__tests__/unit`

Worker notes:
- simulate passage of time explicitly rather than relying on same-day examples only
- include ambiguous phrases and future-planned transitions
- prefer scenarios reusable by later gap-marker and lifecycle tickets
title: Add multi-day temporal regressions for stale references, elapsed gaps, and future state changes
